description: Comprehensive marketing toolkit providing analytics, content quality checks, channel integrations, CAC tracking, browser automation, and outreach tools for marketing agents.
author: Paperclip

googleAdsApiKeyRef.title: Google Ads API Key (secret ref)
googleAdsApiKeyRef.description: Secret reference for the Google Ads API key

metaAdsApiKeyRef.title: Meta Ads API Key (secret ref)
metaAdsApiKeyRef.description: Secret reference for the Meta/Facebook Ads API token

gscApiKeyRef.title: Google Search Console API Key (secret ref)

socialMediaApiKeyRef.title: Social Media Aggregator API Key (secret ref)

cacAlertThreshold.title: CAC Alert Threshold ($)
cacAlertThreshold.description: Alert when any channel CAC exceeds this value

approvalRequiredForSpend.title: Require Approval for Spend Actions
approvalRequiredForSpend.description: Gate email sends, social posts, and push notifications behind approval

bannedAiWords.title: Banned AI Words
bannedAiWords.description: Additional words to flag in humanizer check

googleAdsAccessToken.title: Google Ads OAuth Access Token (secret ref)

googleAdsRefreshToken.title: Google Ads OAuth Refresh Token (secret ref)

twitterAccessToken.title: Twitter/X OAuth 2.0 User Access Token (secret ref)

linkedinAuthorUrn.title: LinkedIn Author URN (e.g. urn:li:person:xxx or urn:li:organization:xxx)

instagramAccessToken.title: Instagram/Facebook Graph API Access Token (secret ref)

gscAccessToken.title: Google Search Console OAuth Access Token (secret ref)

ghostAdminApiKey.title: Ghost Admin API Key (secret ref, format: id:secret)

jobs.description: Generates and distributes a daily marketing performance brief.
Checks CAC thresholds and emits alerts when exceeded.
Scans configured subreddits for brand mentions and opportunities.

tools.name: marketing_calculate_cac
tools.description: Calculate Customer Acquisition Cost by channel from spend and conversion data.

tools.name: marketing_ltv_cac_ratio
tools.description: Calculate LTV:CAC ratio given lifetime value and acquisition cost.

tools.name: marketing_anomaly_detect
tools.description: Z-score based anomaly detection on a time series of metrics.

tools.name: marketing_experiment_score
tools.description: Score an A/B experiment using statistical significance tests.

tools.name: marketing_daily_brief
tools.description: Generate a daily marketing performance brief from all connected channels.

date.description: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD), defaults to today

tools.name: marketing_humanizer_check
tools.description: Check content against banned AI words/patterns and return a humanization score.

tools.name: marketing_expert_panel
tools.description: Run content through a simulated expert panel for quality scoring.

tools.name: marketing_content_calendar
tools.description: Manage content calendar entries: list, add, update, or remove.

tools.name: marketing_seo_check
tools.description: Check content for SEO best practices including keyword density, meta tag suggestions, and readability.

tools.name: marketing_google_ads_report
tools.description: Pull Google Ads performance data for a date range.

tools.name: marketing_meta_ads_report
tools.description: Pull Meta/Facebook Ads performance data for a date range.

tools.name: marketing_gsc_report
tools.description: Pull Google Search Console performance data.

tools.name: marketing_social_metrics
tools.description: Pull social media metrics across platforms.

tools.name: marketing_email_metrics
tools.description: Pull email campaign performance metrics.

tools.name: marketing_reddit_monitor
tools.description: Monitor Reddit for brand mentions and engagement opportunities.

tools.name: marketing_track_spend
tools.description: Record marketing spend by channel and campaign.

tools.name: marketing_track_conversion
tools.description: Record a conversion event with source attribution.

tools.name: marketing_cac_by_channel
tools.description: Get current Customer Acquisition Cost broken down by channel.

tools.name: marketing_cac_trend
tools.description: Get CAC trend over time by channel.

tools.name: marketing_optimize_budget
tools.description: Suggest budget reallocation across channels to minimize overall CAC.

tools.name: marketing_payback_period
tools.description: Calculate customer payback period by acquisition channel.

tools.name: marketing_scrape_serp
tools.description: Scrape search engine results for a query. Useful when API access is not configured.

tools.name: marketing_scrape_competitor
tools.description: Analyze a competitor page for content, meta tags, and structure.

tools.name: marketing_scrape_app_store
tools.description: Pull app store listing data for analysis.

tools.name: marketing_check_landing_page
tools.description: Audit a landing page for conversion optimization, load time, and best practices.

tools.name: marketing_send_email_campaign
tools.description: Send an email campaign via Brevo or Resend. Requires approval when approvalRequiredForSpend is enabled.

tools.name: marketing_schedule_social_post
tools.description: Schedule a social media post. Requires approval when approvalRequiredForSpend is enabled.

tools.name: marketing_send_push_notification
tools.description: Send a push notification via OneSignal. Requires approval when approvalRequiredForSpend is enabled.

tools.name: marketing_whatsapp_brief
tools.description: Send a marketing brief via WhatsApp. Requires approval when approvalRequiredForSpend is enabled.

tools.name: marketing_post_reddit_comment
tools.description: Post a comment on Reddit. Always requires human approval before posting.

tools.name: marketing_google_ads_list_campaigns
tools.description: List Google Ads campaigns with performance metrics via the Google Ads API v18.

tools.name: marketing_google_ads_create_campaign
tools.description: Create a new Google Ads search or display campaign with budget and bidding strategy.

tools.name: marketing_google_ads_update_campaign
tools.description: Update an existing Google Ads campaign (budget, bids, status, name).

tools.name: marketing_google_ads_pause_campaign
tools.description: Pause a specific Google Ads campaign.

tools.name: marketing_google_ads_get_keywords
tools.description: Get keyword performance data from Google Ads including quality score, impressions, clicks.

tools.name: marketing_google_ads_add_keywords
tools.description: Add keywords to a Google Ads ad group.

tools.name: marketing_meta_ads_list_campaigns
tools.description: List Meta/Facebook ad campaigns via the Marketing API v21.0.

tools.name: marketing_meta_ads_create_campaign
tools.description: Create a Meta/Facebook ad campaign with objective and budget.

tools.name: marketing_meta_ads_create_adset
tools.description: Create a Meta ad set with targeting, budget, and optimization settings.

targeting.description: Meta targeting spec (geo_locations, age_min, age_max, genders, interests, etc.)

tools.name: marketing_meta_ads_create_ad
tools.description: Create a Meta ad with creative (inline or existing creative ID).

creativeId.description: Existing creative ID (if not using inline)

tools.name: marketing_meta_ads_update_campaign
tools.description: Update an existing Meta/Facebook ad campaign.

tools.name: marketing_meta_ads_pause_campaign
tools.description: Pause a specific Meta/Facebook ad campaign.

tools.name: marketing_meta_ads_get_insights
tools.description: Get performance insights for a Meta campaign, ad set, or ad.

objectId.description: Campaign, ad set, or ad ID

timeIncrement.description: 1 for daily, 7 for weekly, monthly, etc.

tools.name: marketing_ga4_run_report
tools.description: Run a custom Google Analytics 4 report with arbitrary dimensions and metrics.

dimensions.description: GA4 dimension names (e.g. sessionSource, country, pagePath)

metrics.description: GA4 metric names (e.g. sessions, totalUsers, conversions)

tools.name: marketing_ga4_get_traffic
tools.description: Get website traffic broken down by source, medium, and campaign from GA4.

tools.name: marketing_ga4_get_conversions
tools.description: Get conversion event data from GA4 by event name and source.

tools.name: marketing_ga4_get_user_demographics
tools.description: Get user demographic data from GA4 (country, age, gender, device, language).

tools.name: marketing_ga4_get_realtime
tools.description: Get realtime active user data from GA4.

tools.name: marketing_stripe_get_revenue
tools.description: Get MRR, total revenue, and revenue by period from Stripe.

tools.name: marketing_stripe_get_customers
tools.description: Get customer list from Stripe with estimated LTV and subscription data.

createdAfter.description: ISO date — only customers created after this

tools.name: marketing_stripe_get_subscriptions
tools.description: Get subscription metrics from Stripe including MRR and ARR.

tools.name: marketing_stripe_calculate_ltv
tools.description: Calculate customer Lifetime Value by cohort or acquisition channel from Stripe data.

metadataGroupBy.description: Group by a customer metadata field (e.g. acquisition_channel)

tools.name: marketing_stripe_get_churn
tools.description: Calculate subscription churn rate and retention from Stripe data.

tools.name: marketing_twitter_post
tools.description: Post a tweet via the X API v2. Supports replies, media, and polls.

tools.name: marketing_twitter_get_metrics
tools.description: Get tweet and account metrics from X API v2.

tools.name: marketing_linkedin_post
tools.description: Publish a post to LinkedIn via the REST API v2. Supports text, articles, and images.

tools.name: marketing_linkedin_get_metrics
tools.description: Get LinkedIn post and page metrics including followers, shares, and page views.

tools.name: marketing_instagram_post
tools.description: Publish a photo, video, or reel to Instagram via the Graph API.

tools.name: marketing_instagram_get_metrics
tools.description: Get Instagram post and account insights via the Graph API.

tools.name: marketing_gsc_get_performance
tools.description: Get search performance data from Google Search Console (queries, clicks, impressions, CTR, position).

tools.name: marketing_gsc_get_sitemaps
tools.description: Get sitemap status from Google Search Console.

sitemapUrl.description: Specific sitemap URL to check, or omit for all

tools.name: marketing_gsc_inspect_url
tools.description: Inspect a URL's indexing status in Google Search Console.

tools.name: marketing_generate_content
tools.description: Generate a structured content brief for blog, social, email, or ad copy with tone, keywords, and guidelines.

tools.name: marketing_publish_to_wordpress
tools.description: Publish or draft a blog post to WordPress via the REST API.

tools.name: marketing_publish_to_ghost
tools.description: Publish or draft a post to Ghost CMS via the Admin API.

tools.name: marketing_schedule_email_sequence
tools.description: Create a multi-step email sequence in Brevo or Resend with delay-based scheduling.

delayDays.description: Days after sequence start to send

tools.name: marketing_publish_social_batch
tools.description: Publish content to multiple social platforms (Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram) in one call.

tools.name: marketing_auto_optimize_bids
tools.description: AI-driven bid/budget adjustment based on ROAS targets. Supports dry-run mode.

tools.name: marketing_campaign_health_check
tools.description: Check all active campaigns across Google Ads and Meta Ads against performance thresholds.

tools.name: marketing_emergency_pause_all
tools.description: Emergency pause all active campaigns across platforms for budget protection.

tools.name: marketing_rebalance_budget
tools.description: Rebalance budget allocation across channels based on CAC or ROAS efficiency.
